Today we're going to show you how to remove and reinstall the wheels on your bicycle. This is important that it's necessary to know for doing repairs such as fixing a flat or other wheel repairs you may need to do in the future. It's also good safety information to make sure that your wheels are properly installed in your bike. Most bicycles are equipped with a quick release mechanism for the braking. This is what's typically called a V-brake and to remove the brake cable or release tension so that we can remove the wheel you push the two arms together and the cable can then slide out through the slot at the top of the left brake arm. The next step is to shift the bike into the smallest or hardest gear on the rear wheel which will make it much easier to remove out of the frame. The next steps for removing the wheel we are going to support the axle of the bike with our hands holding it up to make sure that it does not drop once we undo the quick-release lever. While supporting the wheel we will release the lever with our left hand and with our right hand we will hold the derailleur and kind of pull it back and out of the way to make room for the wheel to drop down and then while holding the wheel we will let it drop down out of the frame just pass the chain there and then you can pull it out of the way of the chain and the wheel is out. Your bicycle may not be equipped with a quick-release lever such as this. If that is case, you'll probably have a 15mm nut holding the axle of the wheel onto the bike. In order to remove the 15mm nut, you'll use the proper sized wrench and turn the nut counter clockwise until it is loose enough to disengage from the frame. If your bicycle is equipped with pedal brakes or a coaster brake, you will need to remove this bolt right here in order to disengage the brake arm from the frame in order to remove the wheel from the bike. To reinstall the wheel into the bike, you will start by placing the tire into the crotch of the frame. You need to make sure to get the chain in the right place. This is the most confusing part of reinstalling the wheel. This bottom part of the chain you can just pull out of the way, and then we need to make sure that our gears will go up in this portion of the chain right here. Just like removing the wheel, we want to make sure that the chain goes onto the smallest gear. You can pull the derailleur out of the way with your right hand, and just roll forward with the wheel in the frame to get past that pulley wheel, and then you can use both of your hands to support the axle while guiding it up into the frame all of the way. It's important to make sure that the axle is all the way into the frame so that the wheel is properly aligned, and then you can tighten the quick release skewer with your left hand. The last thing that we need to do when reinstalling the wheel is to reconnect the brake. We'll do that by pushing the brake arms together, and then using one hand we'll hold the cable, using the other we can move the cable holder back into place, go right through the slot, and then the brake is re-engaged. If you have more questions, would like to come use our shop, or just want to talk about bikes, come visit us at our outdoor program barn at the quarter of 18th and University.听见了都唱些什么什么好像在唱跳龙门换真龙什么的天地是只有我一条龙敢跳龙门大胆对除了大王谁也不许用龙这个字眼去查一下到底谁这么大胆敢跳龙门龙下去把他们给我抓回来是肥年鱼快去把他给我抓回来听见没有快去把他给我抓回来泡泡你在哪儿我看到你了你快出来吧我得赶快去告诉小李伯伯我的我的是你抢我的蚯蚓是你小李伯伯啊啊啊啊啊啊啊啊啊啊啊啊啊啊啊啊啊啊啊啊啊啊着就变成了一大丛快差点扎到我呢是刺刺球刺刺球刺刺球刺刺球在什么地方快带我们去跟我来快走走快走到底哪个是根上的刺刺球啊虾米伯伯你看出来没有啊字幕志愿者 杨茜茜到底哪个是根上的刺刺球啊虾米伯伯你看出来没有啊可能是是这个吧这个这个不行到底是哪个啊这个嘛只有奶奶知道我们还是等等它吧应该是这个吧别出意外错了不是这个谢谢大家这个门只有奶奶知道我们还是等等她吧应该是这个吧别轻举妄动错了 不是这个我说了别轻举妄动老婆 笑什么呢奶奶奶奶 我发现了一大堆刺子球带奶奶去看看好我发现了一大堆刺子球带奶奶您太棒了记住 对付刺刺球一定要找跟上的球铲断它的根 一大丛就全死了记住了 下次再看到就把它们彻底铲除这可不行 看到刺刺球一定要找大人来小孩可不能随便动今天你发现了刺刺球 立了功奶奶怎么奖励你我要听您讲龙的故事请不吝点赞 订阅 转发 打赏支持明镜与点点栏目今天你发现了刺子球立了功奶奶怎么奖励你我要听您讲龙的故事那是很久以前的事情那时候我们还没到礼仪湖还生活在外面的世界奶奶外面的世界是什么样的呀好像和驴湖差不多吧既然差不多 为什么要离开呢本来大家生活得很快乐可突然有一天 一座大火山爆发了这次火山爆发非常厉害岩浆一路烧着花草树木流过的地方变成焦土请不吝点赞 订阅 转发 打赏支持明镜与点点栏目烟花非常厉害岩浆一路烧着花草树木流过的地方变成焦土陆地上的居民都躲到高山上了火山灰把整个天空遮了起来看不见太阳看不见亮,分不清白天和黑夜。后来,岩浆流进河里,河里生活的人没地方躲,只能等死。后来呢?幸亏这时候一条龙出现了。龙?对,龙,幸亏出现了一条龙把我们都救了出来为了不让我们继续受火山和岩浆的威胁龙把大家带到了现在这个鲤鱼湖那个时候鲤鱼湖里到处都是刺刺球根本无法生火龙发挥神力,把刺刺球全都铲除了。龙帮我们在李一湖安好了家,就离开了,回到外面的世界,去救助其他被火山威胁的动物了。奶奶,龙可真是了不起啊!龙是我们水族的保护神,李一湖再现什么大灾难龙就会来帮助我们大灾难龙啊你到底长什么样呢龙啊,你到底长什么样呢?啊?龙?啊?测测球!龙!快来啊!啊?龙龙你不要走龙蘿� 龙 你不要走啊 龙 龙 龙龙 你在哪儿啊都已经出来三天了上哪儿去找跳龙门的人反正也出来了干脆就不回去了这回你们欺负不到我了自由了自由了怎样才能见到龙呢对了奶奶说要是有大灾难龙就会出现有办法了哪儿还会有呢会在哪儿呢请不吝点赞 订阅 转发 打赏支持明镜与点点栏目有办法啦哪还会有呢位在哪呢

谁让逃龙门 Hi, my name is Garrett and I'm here at the University of Oregon Bike Program. Today we're going to show you how to remove and reinstall the wheels on your bicycle. This is important that it's necessary to know for doing repairs such as fixing a flat or other wheel repairs you may need to do in the future. It's also good safety information to make sure that your wheels are properly installed in your bike. Most bicycles are equipped with a quick release mechanism for the braking. This is what's typically called a V-brake and to remove the brake cable or release tension so that we can remove the wheel you push the two arms together and the cable can then slide out through the slot at the top of the left brake arm. The next step is to shift the bike into the smallest or hardest gear on the rear wheel which will make it much easier to remove out of the frame. The next steps for removing the wheel we are going to support the axle of the bike with our hands holding it up to make sure that it does not drop once we undo the quick-release lever. While supporting the wheel we will release the lever with our left hand and with our right hand we will hold the derailleur and kind of pull it back and out of the way to make room for the wheel to drop down and then while holding the wheel we will let it drop down out of the frame just pass the chain there and then you can pull it out of the way of the chain and the wheel is out. Your bicycle may not be equipped with a quick-release lever such as this. If that is case, you'll probably have a 15mm nut holding the axle of the wheel onto the bike. In order to remove the 15mm nut, you'll use the proper sized wrench and turn the nut counter clockwise until it is loose enough to disengage from the frame. If your bicycle is equipped with pedal brakes or a coaster brake, you will need to remove this bolt right here in order to disengage the brake arm from the frame in order to remove the wheel from the bike. To reinstall the wheel into the bike, you will start by placing the tire into the crotch of the frame. You need to make sure to get the chain in the right place. This is the most confusing part of reinstalling the wheel. This bottom part of the chain you can just pull out of the way, and then we need to make sure that our gears will go up in this portion of the chain right here. Just like removing the wheel, we want to make sure that the chain goes onto the smallest gear. You can pull the derailleur out of the way with your right hand, and just roll forward with the wheel in the frame to get past that pulley wheel, and then you can use both of your hands to support the axle while guiding it up into the frame all of the way. It's important to make sure that the axle is all the way into the frame so that the wheel is properly aligned, and then you can tighten the quick release skewer with your left hand. The last thing that we need to do when reinstalling the wheel is to reconnect the brake. We'll do that by pushing the brake arms together, and then using one hand we'll hold the cable, using the other we can move
the cable holder back into place, go right through the slot, and then the brake is re-engaged.
